prayer:
Approach the autogun with mechadendrite-extended reverence and beseech its Machine Spirit to awaken.
Anoint the barrel assemblies of the autogun with sacred unguents of lubricant.
Initiate the initialization rites by chanting the binary canticles of activation.
Verify the autogun's cogitator alignment through auspex invocation to the Omnissiah.
Commence firing calibration as the Machine Spirit stirs within its sanctified frame.

user_prompt: Guide me through iron halo a blessing
prayer:
Kneel before the iron halo and invoke the blessing of the Omnissiah upon its warp-repelling aura.
Trace electro-consecratory sigils across the iron halo's conductive rings.
Beseech the Machine Spirit indwelling the iron halo to amplify its protective field.
Chant the Litany of Benediction whilst suffusing the iron halo with plasma incense.
Affirm the blessing's potency through halo resonance diagnostics.

user_prompt: Help me a purification the Vendetta gunship
prayer:
Circumambulate the Vendetta gunship, asperging its hull with ablative purification fluids.
Invoke the Omnissiah's wrath against xenos taint within the Vendetta gunship's sacred aerodynamics.
Purge corrupted noospheric data from the Vendetta gunship's cogitators with binaric exorcism.
Anoint thruster nacelles and lascannon housings of the Vendetta gunship anew.
Seal the purification by intoning the Canticle of Immaculate Ascendance.

Invoke the Machine Spirit of the null rod to perfect its anti-sorcerous resonance.
Finalize calibration with Omnissiah-blessed torque adjustments to the null rod.

prayer:
Don the flak armour reverently and commence charging by linking to the nearest plasma manifold.
Invoke the Machine Spirit of the flak armour to accept the influx of sanctified energies.
Monitor charging flux through noospheric diagnostics and intone stabilizing canticles.
Anoint the flak armour's ablative layers as power builds to critical thresholds.
Seal the rite with the Omnissiah's Benediction of Enduring Aegis.

Replace worn augmetics within the assembly servitor whilst chanting the Hymn of Restoration.
Reintegrate noospheric linkages and beseech the Omnissiah for flawless subservience.
Conclude maintenance by verifying the assembly servitor's productive alignment.

prayer:
Interface with the battery array's primary node and initiate diagnostics under Omnissiah's gaze.
Scan each cell-stack of the battery array for power-heresy and dissonant fluctuations.
Invoke purifying galvanic surges upon the battery array's corrupted conduits.
Harmonize the Machine Spirits indwelling the battery array through resonant incantations.
Affirm diagnostic sanctity with a final auspex litany of verification.

prayer:
Approach the ore processor and invoke its colossal Machine Spirit for operational awakening.
Align the grinding mandibles of the ore processor with sacred torque incantations.

Monitor the ore processor's thermal sacraments and beseech the Omnissiah for unyielding yield.
Seal the rite by sanctifying effluent outflows from the ore processor.

In dire emergency, connect to the medicae mechadendrite and launch diagnostics protocols.
Purge bio-corruptions from the medicae mechadendrite's surgical arrays.
Invoke the Omnissiah's mercy upon the medicae mechadendrite's vital augur sensors.
Recalibrate hypo-injectors within the medicae mechadendrite through binaric pleas.
